recommendations.title: Vengeance Is Mine
recommendations.overview: A thief, a murderer, and a charming lady-killer, Iwao Enokizu is on the run from the police.

recommendations.title: Black Rain
recommendations.overview: Shigematsu Shizuma, who lives with his family in a village near Fukuyama, was in Hiroshima with his wife and niece just after the devastating atomic bombing, a tragedy that cruelly took the lives of thousands of people and forever marked the harsh ex

recommendations.title: The Eel
recommendations.overview: A businessman kills his adulterous wife and is sent to prison. After his release, he opens a barbershop and meets new people, talking  to almost no one except for an eel he befriended while in prison.

recommendations.title: The Boy Who Harnessed the Wind
recommendations.overview: Against all the odds, a thirteen year old boy in Malawi invents an unconventional way to save his family and village from famine.

recommendations.title: September 11
recommendations.overview: An anthology of short films inspired by the events of the September 11 World Trade Center attacks.
recommendations.director: Ken Loach, Shōhei Imamura, Samira Makhmalbaf, Idrissa Ouedraogo, Alejandro González Iñárritu, Claude Lelouch, Amos Gitai, Sean Penn, Danis Tanović, Youssef Chahine, Mira Nair

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.

recommendations.title: Trouble at Timpetill
recommendations.overview: The children of a small European mountain village end up being its only residents, soon after the adults cannot take their behavior any longer.

recommendations.title: The Girl in the Fog
recommendations.overview: A gripping and chilling thriller that brings us to a hazy mountain village where an enigmatic detective is investigating the sudden disappearance of fifteen-year-old girl.

recommendations.title: Out Cold
recommendations.overview: Rick Rambis and his friends are having the time of their lives on Bull Mountain—until the legendary Papa Muntz' son decides to sell the mountain to a sleazy land developer, have the staff fired and turn Bull Mountain into 'Yuppieville'.

recommendations.title: Young Hearts
recommendations.overview: 14-year-old Elias increasingly feels like an outsider in his village. When he meets his new neighbour of the same age, Alexander, Elias is confronted with his burgeoning sexuality.
